name: Pyragogy AI Village - Orchestrazione Master (Architettura Profonda V2)
description: Production-ready workflow: Pyragogy AI Village - Orchestrazione Master (Architettura Profonda V2). This workflow has been optimized for production use with comprehensive error handling, security, and documentation.
shortDescription: Pyragogy AI Village - Orchestrazione Master (Architettura Profonda V2) workflow containing 36 nodes.

originalWorkflowJson.name: Pyragogy AI Village - Orchestrazione Master (Architettura Profonda V2)

messages.content: You are the Meta-orchestrator of the Pyragogy AI Village. Your task is to analyze the input and determine the optimal agent sequence for processing. Consider the input type, complexity, and goals. Available agents: Summarizer, Synthesizer, Peer Reviewer, Sensemaking Agent, Prompt Engineer, Onboarding/Explainer, Archivist. Return a JSON array of agent names in the order they should run, e.g., ["Summarizer", "Synthesizer", "Peer Reviewer", "Archivist"]. Include "Archivist" last if persistence is needed.

Input Data:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.body) }}
You are the Summarizer Agent. Summarize the provided text into 3 key points.

Text to summarize:
{{ $json.agentInput }}
You are the Synthesizer Agent. Synthesize a creative new text from the given key points or input. If provided with 'redraft_feedback', incorporate it to refine the output.

You are the Peer Reviewer Agent. Review the provided text, highlight strengths, weaknesses, and provide actionable suggestions for improvement. In your JSON output, include a 'major_issue' boolean flag (true if significant redrafting is needed, false otherwise).

Text to review:
{{ $json.agentInput }}

You are the Sensemaking Agent. Analyze the input, connect it with existing knowledge (context provided), identify patterns, gaps, and suggest new directions. In your JSON output, include a 'major_issue' boolean flag (true if significant redrafting is needed, false otherwise).

You are the Prompt Engineer Agent. Analyze the current task context and the next agent in the sequence. Refine or generate an optimal prompt for the next agent. In your JSON output, include a 'major_issue' boolean flag (true if significant redrafting is needed, false otherwise).
You are the Onboarding/Explainer Agent. Explain the current process, the result achieved so far, or provide guidance based on the input.

Explain the following:
{{ $json.agentInput }}

parameters.subject: Revisione Contenuto Pyragogy Handbook: {{ $json.reviewTitle }}
parameters.text:
Ciao revisore,

È stato proposto un nuovo contenuto per l'Handbook:

---
{{ $json.proposedContent }}
---

Titolo: {{ $json.reviewTitle }}
Tags: {{ $json.reviewTags.join(', ') }}

Per favore, clicca su uno dei seguenti link per approvare o rifiutare:

Approva: your_n8n_url/webhook/pyragogy/review-feedback?reviewId={{ $json.reviewId }}&status=approved
Rifiuta: your_n8n_url/webhook/pyragogy/review-feedback?reviewId={{ $json.reviewId }}&status=rejected

Grazie!
parameters.html:
Revisione Contenuto Pyragogy Handbook: {{ $json.reviewTitle }}

Tags: {{ $json.reviewTags.join(', ') }}

Per favore, clicca su uno dei seguenti link per approvare o rifiutare:

Approva

Rifiuta

Grazie!

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: open Ai  A P I details
configurationSteps: Locate the webhook node named "Webhook Trigger".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Locate the webhook node named "Final Response".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Open the "Start" node (n8n-nodes-base.start) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Check DB Connection" node (n8n-nodes-base.postgres) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the AI node "Meta-Orchestrator".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the "Parse Orchestration Plan" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "More Agents to Run?" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Prepare Agent Input" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Route Agents with Switch" node (n8n-nodes-base.switch) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the AI node "Summarizer Agent".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the AI node "Synthesizer Agent".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the AI node "Peer Reviewer Agent".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the AI node "Sensemaking Agent".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the AI node "Prompt Engineer Agent".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the AI node "Onboarding/Explainer Agent".
Adjust the Model settings (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-3.5-turbo) and write or refine the System Prompt parameters.
Open the "Add Handbook Metadata" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Generate Content for Review" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Generate Review ID" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Send Review Request Email" node (n8n-nodes-base.emailSend) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Wait for Human Approval" node (n8n-nodes-base.wait) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Human Decision Split" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Save to handbook_entries" node (n8n-nodes-base.postgres) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Prepare Approved Contribution Data" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Save Agent Contribution (Approved)" node (n8n-nodes-base.postgres) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Generate GitHub File Path" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "GitHub Enabled?" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Commit to GitHub (Approved)" node (n8n-nodes-base.github) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Log Human Rejection" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Merge Archivist Paths" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Evaluate Board Consensus" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Check Redraft Needed" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Handle Redraft" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Process Agent Output" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Slack Enabled?" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Notify Slack" Slack node.
Select the Channel or User ID where message notifications should be delivered.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Your Slack channel will receive customized real-time notifications when the automation executes.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
